description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, matte black finish and a classic, streamlined profile. The frame and slide are constructed from metal, with subtle contours and a squared-off trigger guard. The grip is ergonomically shaped, likely made from a polymer or textured composite, and features a smooth surface with minimal embellishments. The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and lacks external threading or compensators. There are no visible manufacturer markings, engravings, or serial numbers on the slide or frame. The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the grip, without any flaring or finger extensions.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a streamlined metal frame, smooth ergonomic grip, and a flat magazine base. The design is minimalistic, with no visible markings or embellishments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the smooth grip, squared trigger guard, and flush barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the grip and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the slide, hammer, and the top of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is smoothly contoured with a gentle ergonomic curve, providing a comfortable hold. Its surface appears to be made of a matte polymer or composite material, lacking any visible checkering, stippling, or texturing. There are no finger grooves, logos, or decorative embellishments, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off with a moderate thickness and a subtle undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. It is untextured and lacks any reinforcement or integrated accessory rails, maintaining a simple and functional design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unembellished, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers apparent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the bottom of the grip. It lacks any flaring, finger rests, or texturing, and there are no visible logos or distinguishing features.
